symbols.name: IGenericReadOnlyRepository
symbols.summary: Represents the base interface for all repository abstractions. Repositories serve as a bridge between the domain and data mapping layers, enabling a more abstract and decoupled approach to data access.

syntax.content: public interface IGenericReadOnlyRepository : IRepository where TEntity : class, IEntity

symbols.name: FindAllAsync(IFindOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Asynchronously retrieves all entities of type TEntity based on the specified find options and cancellation token.

syntax.content: Task> FindAllAsync(IFindOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: An optional set of criteria to filter and sort the results.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains an enumerable collection of entities of type TEntity.

parameters.description: An optional set of criteria to filter and sort the results.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains an enumerable collection of entities of type TEntity.

symbols.name: FindAllAsync(ISpecification, IFindOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Finds all entities that match the specified criteria asynchronously.

syntax.content: Task> FindAllAsync(ISpecification specification, IFindOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The specification to filter the entities.
Optional find options for querying the entities.
Optional cancellation token to cancel the operation.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains an enumerable of entities that match the specification.

parameters.description: The specification to filter the entities.
Optional find options for querying the entities.
Optional cancellation token to cancel the operation.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains an enumerable of entities that match the specification.

symbols.name: FindAllAsync(IEnumerable>, IFindOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Finds all entities that match the given specifications.

syntax.content: Task> FindAllAsync(IEnumerable> specifications, IFindOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The collection of specifications to filter the entities.
Optional find options to apply additional query customization.
A cancellation token to observe while waiting for the task to complete.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains a collection of entities that match the given specifications.

parameters.description: The collection of specifications to filter the entities.
Optional find options to apply additional query customization.
A cancellation token to observe while waiting for the task to complete.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains a collection of entities that match the given specifications.

symbols.name: FindOneAsync(object, IFindOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Asynchronously finds a single entity by its identifier.

syntax.content: Task FindOneAsync(object id, IFindOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The identifier of the entity.
Optional query options for finding the entity.
Optional token to cancel the asynchronous operation.

returns.description: A Task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the found entity, or null if no entity with the given identifier is found.

parameters.description: The identifier of the entity.
Optional query options for finding the entity.
Optional token to cancel the asynchronous operation.

returns.description: A Task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the found entity, or null if no entity with the given identifier is found.

symbols.name: FindOneAsync(ISpecification, IFindOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Finds a single entity that matches the specified criteria.

syntax.content: Task FindOneAsync(ISpecification specification, IFindOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The specification that defines the criteria for the entity to be found.
Optional find options to customize the search behavior.
A token to cancel the asynchronous operation.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous find operation. The task result contains the found entity, or null if no entity matches the criteria.

parameters.description: The specification that defines the criteria for the entity to be found.
Optional find options to customize the search behavior.
A token to cancel the asynchronous operation.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous find operation. The task result contains the found entity, or null if no entity matches the criteria.

symbols.name: FindOneAsync(IEnumerable>, IFindOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Asynchronously retrieves a single entity of type TEntity based on the specified specifications and find options.

syntax.content: Task FindOneAsync(IEnumerable> specifications, IFindOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: A collection of criteria used to filter the entities.
Optional find options to modify query behavior, such as sorting. If null, default options are used.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains a single entity of type TEntity if found; otherwise, null.

parameters.description: A collection of criteria used to filter the entities.
Optional find options to modify query behavior, such as sorting. If null, default options are used.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains a single entity of type TEntity if found; otherwise, null.

symbols.name: ProjectAllAsync(Expression>, IFindOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Projects all entities of type TEntity to a collection of type TProjection.

syntax.content: Task> ProjectAllAsync(Expression> projection, IFindOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: Expression defining the projection of TEntity to TProjection.
Optional parameters for customizing the find operation.
Token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation, containing the projected collection of type TProjection.

parameters.description: Expression defining the projection of TEntity to TProjection.
Optional parameters for customizing the find operation.
Token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation, containing the projected collection of type TProjection.

symbols.name: ProjectAllAsync(ISpecification, Expression>, IFindOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Asynchronously projects all entities of type TEntity to a specified projection type based on the given specification, projection expression, options, and cancellation token.

syntax.content: Task> ProjectAllAsync(ISpecification specification, Expression> projection, IFindOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The specification that entities must satisfy.
The expression defining the projection of entities.
Optional criteria for filtering and sorting results.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains an enumerable collection of projected entities of type TProjection.

parameters.description: The specification that entities must satisfy.
The expression defining the projection of entities.
Optional criteria for filtering and sorting results.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains an enumerable collection of projected entities of type TProjection.

symbols.name: ProjectAllAsync(IEnumerable>, Expression>, IFindOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Projects all entities that match the given specifications to a new form as specified by the projection expression.

syntax.content: Task> ProjectAllAsync(IEnumerable> specifications, Expression> projection, IFindOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: A collection of specifications that entities must satisfy.
An expression that defines the projection from the entity to the new form.
Optional find options to customize query behavior.
A cancellation token to observe while waiting for the task to complete.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains a collection of projected entities.

parameters.description: A collection of specifications that entities must satisfy.
An expression that defines the projection from the entity to the new form.
Optional find options to customize query behavior.
A cancellation token to observe while waiting for the task to complete.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains a collection of projected entities.

symbols.name: ExistsAsync(object, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Checks if an entity with the specified identifier exists in the repository.

syntax.content: Task ExistsAsync(object id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The identifier of the entity to check for existence.
A token to cancel the operation.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains a boolean value indicating whether the entity exists.

parameters.description: The identifier of the entity to check for existence.
A token to cancel the operation.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains a boolean value indicating whether the entity exists.

symbols.name: CountAsync(IEnumerable>, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Asynchronously counts the number of entities that satisfy the provided specifications.

syntax.content: Task CountAsync(IEnumerable> specifications, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: A collection of specifications to filter the entities.
A cancellation token to observe while waiting for the task to complete.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the count of entities.

parameters.description: A collection of specifications to filter the entities.
A cancellation token to observe while waiting for the task to complete.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the count of entities.

symbols.name: CountAsync(ISpecification, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Asynchronously counts the number of entities that satisfy the specified criteria.

syntax.content: Task CountAsync(ISpecification specification, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The criteria that entities must satisfy to be counted.
A token to cancel the operation.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the count of entities that satisfy the specified criteria.

parameters.description: The criteria that entities must satisfy to be counted.
A token to cancel the operation.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the count of entities that satisfy the specified criteria.
